mapper.insert:
/* DR수익 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_dr_revenue ( site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.stdYearm}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.reductCap}, #{entity.basicPrice}, #{entity.maxReductRatio}, #{entity.minReductRatio}, #{entity.totPay}, #{entity.basicPay}, #{entity.reductStimestamp}, #{entity.reductEtimestamp}, #{entity.reductSdate}, #{entity.reductEdate}, #{entity.cblAmt}, #{entity.actAmt}, #{entity.reductAmt}, #{entity.smp}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* DR수익 수정 */ UPDATE tb_dr_revenue
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
std_yearm = #{entity.stdYearm},
std_timestamp = #{entity.stdTimestamp},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
reduct_cap = #{entity.reductCap},
basic_price = #{entity.basicPrice},
max_reduct_ratio = #{entity.maxReductRatio},
min_reduct_ratio = #{entity.minReductRatio},
tot_pay = #{entity.totPay},
basic_pay = #{entity.basicPay},
reduct_stimestamp = #{entity.reductStimestamp},
reduct_etimestamp = #{entity.reductEtimestamp},
reduct_sdate = #{entity.reductSdate},
reduct_edate = #{entity.reductEdate},
cbl_amt = #{entity.cblAmt},
act_amt = #{entity.actAmt},
reduct_amt = #{entity.reductAmt},
smp = #{entity.smp},
mod_date = NOW()
WHERE dr_revn_idx = #{entity.drRevnIdx}
mapper.select: /* DR수익 상세조회 */ SELECT dr_revn_idx, site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_dr_revenue WHERE dr_revn_idx = #{drRevnIdx}

/* DR수익 목록조회 */ SELECT dr_revn_idx, site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_dr_revenue
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}

/* DR수익 상세조회 */ SELECT dr_revn_idx, site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_dr_revenue WHERE site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY std_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

/* DR수익 상세조회 */ SELECT dr_revn_idx, site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_dr_revenue WHERE site_id = #{siteId} AND std_timestamp = #{stdTimestamp} AND reduct_stimestamp = #{reductStimestamp} LIMIT 1
